name: Queasy Quail Eggs
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash the potatoes thoroughly in cold water and place them in a large saucepan.
2. Place the frozen broccoli in a small saucepan. Cover both with water and a pinch of salt.
3. Cook the potatoes over high heat for approximately 15 minutes or until tender.
4. Cook the broccoli about 5 minutes or until tender. Carefully drain the vegetables through a colander over the sink.
5. Put the broccoli in a blender and blend on medium for a few seconds until it is the consistency of thick salsa.
6. Place the cheese spread in a small saucepan and cook on low heat, stirring continuously, until it's completely melted.
7. Remove the cheese from the stove and pour into a mixing bowl. Add the broccoli and mix until the cheese is completely green.
8. Using a fork, spear each potato one at a time and dip into the cheese mixture, covering completely. Set the potatoes on a platter, spoon extra cheese over, and serve. Serves 4-6 people.
Sicko serving suggestion: Rotten eggs are the perfect side dish to serve with chicken or other poultry. Just ask Mom or Dad to rustle up a dead bird and bake it!
